title: Scene Lists a la FGC Project for the Films

wikitext: []: Scene Lists (a la FGC Project) for the Films?             Quote Post by CoolJosh2002 » Sat Apr 01, 2023 7:04 am Evening all! I was just wondering if anyone had a list of Scenes in Death, EoE, and the Rebuild films a-la the Commentary Project pages. Like how they split each episode into multiple smaller scenes so each scene has its own page. I don't own any Japanese releases myself, so I obviously can't check on my own. Just something as simple as a Scene list, with a description of the starting point of the scene. If Cut Numbers are provided (Like 001-022) that would be much appreciated but not necessary. It'll help with putting together the movies when I get to them in my Dub Project, as it helps me split things up. Any help would be much appreciated! Mods, if this is in the wrong place, then please move it to the right place. And if it is then I apologise in advance!

[]: Scene Lists (a la FGC Project) for the Films?             Quote Post by CoolJosh2002 » Sat Apr 01, 2023 7:04 am Evening all! I was just wondering if anyone had a list of Scenes in Death, EoE, and the Rebuild films a-la the Commentary Project pages. Like how they split each episode into multiple smaller scenes so each scene has its own page. I don't own any Japanese releases myself, so I obviously can't check on my own. Just something as simple as a Scene list, with a description of the starting point of the scene. If Cut Numbers are provided (Like 001-022) that would be much appreciated but not necessary. It'll help with putting together the movies when I get to them in my Dub Project, as it helps me split things up. Any help would be much appreciated!
